title: Turkish Vegetable Pilaf
description: A flavorful and comforting side dish made with tender vegetables and aromatic spices. Serve alongside your favorite main courses for a delicious and satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened and lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the carrots and cook, stirring occasionally, for 5 minutes.
Add the zucchini and cook, stirring occasionally, for 3-4 minutes.
Add the garlic, thyme, salt, and pepper. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the pilaf rice and stir to combine with the vegetables.
Add 2 cups of water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until the liquid is absorbed and the rice is tender.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
